intent: Extract the dufs web gallery, the Flutter app, and the dufs/cloud setup scripts into a new public repo github.com/kuhyx/dufs-cloud (with history), then remove them from this monorepo, leaving a pointer.
scope: Remove cloud_gallery/ and the 6 dufs/cloud scripts + dufs.service template
Update phone_focus_mode/config.sh comment and CLAUDE.md pointer
Non-goal: KeePass sync scripts stay (separate feature)
changes: These now live (with full git history) in github.com/kuhyx/dufs-cloud under web/, app/, scripts/; the live media-cloud-sync systemd units were re-pointed to ~/dufs-cloud/scripts/.
phone_focus_mode/config.sh: dufs_client whitelist comment now points at the new repo.
CLAUDE.md: added dufs-cloud to the extracted-repos list.

verification.evidence: media-cloud-sync.service ExecStart=/home/kuhy/dufs-cloud/scripts/sync_media_to_cloud.sh; ran once with ExecMainStatus=0; timer+path active
web: 62 tests 100% cov, lint clean, build ok; app: 36 tests 100% line cov, flutter analyze --fatal-infos clean
only comments/docs (historical HTML, inactive legacy keepass templates) reference the removed names

risks: The live media-cloud-sync units depend on ~/dufs-cloud being present; if that checkout is deleted, the timer's ExecStart fails (path watcher/timer stay, sync no-ops).
The docs/explanations HTML still references the old script paths (historical record, left intentionally).
rollback: git revert this commit restores the scripts in the monorepo; re-point the systemd units back with sed to the testsAndMisc paths and daemon-reload.
